title: Student Welfare: Freedom from Discrimination, Harassment, and Retaliation
description: This policy addresses the rights of students to be free from discrimination, harassment, and retaliation in the school environment. It covers protections based on characteristics such as race, sex, disability, and other protected categories, and outlines the standards for identifying and responding to prohibited conduct. The policy also governs how complaints related to these issues are to be handled within the district.
